## Related Issue

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`cd McClaw && swift build`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`cd McClaw && swift test`)
- [ ] App builds successfully (`./scripts/build-app.sh`)
- [ ] New code includes tests (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing functionality
